parsed.production_notes: Natural lighting, realistic skin textures, and fluid body language indicate human actors. No AI artifacts like morphing or unnatural movements are present.

characters.appearance: Older Indian woman, late 50s, medium build, fair complexion. Black hair tied back.
characters.wardrobe: Light grey and white patterned salwar kameez with a floral dupatta.
characters.demeanor: Curious and initially questioning, later attentive.

characters.appearance: Young Indian woman, late 20s, medium build, fair complexion. Black hair.
characters.wardrobe: Pink top, black pants with white side stripes, and a solid pink dupatta draped over her head and shoulders.

scenes.setting: Living room, daytime, patterned wallpaper, dark sofa with patterned cushions.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A and Character B sit next to each other on a dark sofa with patterned cushions. Character A is on the left, turned slightly to face Character B. Character B is on the right, gesturing with her hands as she speaks to Character A. The background consists of a wall with a gold and brown leaf pattern. The lighting is soft and natural.

scenes.visual_description: A continuous medium shot of the two women conversing on the sofa. A red banner with text is visible at the top of the frame. Dynamic text subtitles appear at the bottom, changing with the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: बहू मैंने देखा है तुम दिन भर इंग्लिश में किसी से बात करती रहती हो। कौन है वो? [Daughter-in-law, I have seen you talking to someone in English all day. Who is it?]
Character B says: अरे मम्मी जी, वो कोई और नहीं है, SpeakX का AI इंग्लिश टीचर है। [Oh mother-in-law, it's no one else, it's SpeakX's AI English teacher.]
Character B says: वो मुझे इंग्लिश में कैसे बात करनी है, वो सिखाती है। [She teaches me how to converse in English.]
Character B says: मैं सोच रही हूँ मैं भी कोई जॉब कर लूँ, इसीलिए। [I am thinking of getting a job too, that's why.]
Character A says: क्यों? मेरे बेटे की कमाई से घर नहीं चल रहा क्या? [Why? Is my son's income not enough to run the house?]
Character B says: ऐसा नहीं है मम्मी। मैं पढ़ाई में बहुत तेज़ थी, लेकिन उसका कुछ कर नहीं पाई। [It's not like that, mother. I was very bright in studies, but couldn't do anything with it.]
Character B says: अब शादी और बच्चे तो हो गए, तो मैंने सोचा कि मैं घर पे क्या करूँगी। [Now that I am married and have kids, I thought what will I do at home.]
Character B says: अगर मैं भी कमाने लगी, तो उनको भी मदद मिलेगी। [If I also start earning, it will help him too.]
Character B says: और आजकल हर जॉब में इंग्लिश बोलना बहुत ज़रूरी है। [And nowadays, speaking English is very important in every job.]
Character B says: इसीलिए SpeakX ऐप पे प्रैक्टिस करती हूँ। [That's why I practice on the SpeakX app.]
Character B says: इसके AI इंग्लिश टीचर मुझे दिन में 10 मिनट बात करके 2 हफ्ते में फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश सिखा दिए हैं। [Its AI English teacher has taught me fluent English in 2 weeks by talking for 10 minutes a day.]
Character B says: अब मुझे भी अच्छी कंपनीज़ ऑफर दे रही हैं। [Now good companies are offering me jobs too.]
Character B says: क्योंकि मैं कॉन्फिडेंट से फर्स्ट क्लास इंग्लिश बोल पाती हूँ। [Because I can speak first-class English confidently.]
scenes.on_screen_text: जल्दी फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश सीखो घर बैठे जॉब पाओ (Learn fluent English quickly, get a job from home). Dynamic Hinglish subtitles.

scenes.setting: Living room, daytime, patterned wallpaper, dark sofa.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character B sits on the sofa, facing forward and looking directly at the camera. She gestures with her right hand while speaking. Character A is partially visible on the far left edge of the frame, looking towards Character B. The background is the same gold and brown patterned wall.

scenes.visual_description: The camera angle shifts slightly to focus more on Character B as she addresses the viewer directly. The red banner remains at the top, and dynamic subtitles continue at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: अगर आपको भी जॉब करना है और उसके लिए इंग्लिश सीखना है, तो अभी SpeakX ऐप डाउनलोड करें। [If you also want to do a job and learn English for it, then download the SpeakX app now.]
scenes.on_screen_text: जल्दी फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश सीखो घर बैठे जॉब पाओ (Learn fluent English quickly, get a job from home). Dynamic Hinglish subtitles.
